revision.text:
[[File:VisualEditor-logo.svg|frameless|200px|left]] Instructions on this page may not work with VisualEditor. If you have [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-betafeatures|opted in]], you can use either [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|VisualEditor]] or classic editing through [[Help:Wiki markup|wiki markup]] (wikitext) to edit most pages. The directions on this page, especially about what codes to type to produce formatting effects, are predominantly geared toward wikitext editing. For instructions on editing with VisualEditor, see [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/User guide]]. {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text:
[[File:VisualEditor-logo.svg|frameless|200px|left]] Instructions on this page may not work with VisualEditor. If you have [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-betafeatures|opted in]], you can use either [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|VisualEditor]] or classic editing through [[Help:Wiki markup|wiki markup]] (wikitext) to edit most pages. The directions on this page, especially about what codes to type to produce formatting effects, are predominantly geared toward wikitext editing. For instructions on editing with VisualEditor, see [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/User guide]]. {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
[[File:VisualEditor-logo.svg|frameless|200px|left]] Instructions on this page may not work with VisualEditor. If you have [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-betafeatures|opted in]], you can use either [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|VisualEditor]] or classic editing through [[Help:Wiki markup|wiki markup]] (wikitext) to edit most pages. The directions on this page, especially about what codes to type to produce formatting effects, are predominantly geared toward wikitext editing. For instructions on editing with VisualEditor, see [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/User guide]]. {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}}}
{{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
[[File:VisualEditor-logo.svg|frameless|200px|left]] Instructions on this page may not work with VisualEditor. If you have [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-betafeatures|opted in]], you can use either [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|VisualEditor]] or classic editing through [[Help:Wiki markup|wiki markup]] (wikitext) to edit most pages. The directions on this page, especially about what codes to type to produce formatting effects, are predominantly geared toward wikitext editing. For instructions on editing with VisualEditor, see [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor/User guide]]. {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23692667944|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
